heading: Elimination of procurement preferences
label: 765b Elimination of procurement preferences
text: Nothing in this subchapter or the Communications Act of 1934 [ et seq.] shall be construed to authorize or require any preference, in Federal Government procurement of telecommunications services, for the satellite space segment provided by INTELSAT, Inmarsat, or any successor entity or separated entity.47 U.S.C. 151
notes: References in TextThe Communications Act of 1934, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to chapter 5 (§ 151 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 19, 1934, ch. 65248 Stat. 1064section 609 of this title
